mapper.insert:
SELECT 'USERS_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(user_id, 7))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM users WHERE user_id LIKE 'USERS_%'
INSERT INTO users ( user_id, login_id, password, user_name, email, phone ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phone} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id ,login_id ,password ,user_name ,email ,phone ,identity_verified_yn ,subscribe_yn FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
